execution_context.mode_reason: Generic Piano fixture validates platform-native schema behavior without client-specific artifacts.

preservation_requirements: Keep structured JSON fields stable for validation.

template_diff_summary.summary: No client workbook template is used in this generic fixture.

document.title: Generic Piano Analytics content page tracking plan
document.notes: Generic Piano-only fixture for validating platform-neutral tracking-plan fields without GA4 payload placeholders.

measurement_brief.scope: Single content page display and primary internal navigation click.
measurement_brief.business_goal: Understand content page viewing and navigation to deeper content.
constraints: Use Piano native event names and Data Model properties

page_roles.business_purpose: Measure content display and controlled internal navigation without introducing GA4-specific placeholders.
page_roles.primary_success_signal: Users display the page and continue to deeper content through internal navigation.

selected_event_families.reason: Piano provides a native standard event for page and virtual-page display.
Internal navigation clicks should use the Piano standard navigation-click event and controlled click taxonomy.

excluded_event_families.reason: This fixture is Piano-only; GA4 fields are excluded unless GA4 is explicitly in scope as a separate platform.
Piano click.navigation is more precise for internal navigation than a generic action click.

scalability_notes: Keep Piano page and click properties separate from GA4 parameters when adding cross-platform mappings later.
Reuse page chapter and navigation taxonomies across content pages so reports remain comparable.

website_coverage_map.coverage_summary: Fixture scope covers one representative Piano content page engagement journey.

sources_checked.used_for: Define the content page scope and expected page display plus navigation click.
Represent the content page template and internal navigation component.

journeys_covered.notes: Subscription, search, media, and download journeys are outside this fixture.

playwright_recommendation.reason: The fixture validates a single content page journey with no dynamic discovery requirement.

journeys_discovered.decision_reason: Subscription, search, media, and download journeys are outside this fixture.

events.business_question: How many users display the content page and in which content section?
events.trigger: Content page is displayed or virtual page route is rendered.

platform_mappings.implementation_notes: Send with the Piano Analytics JavaScript SDK when the page is displayed.

implementation_payloads.notes: Canonical Piano SDK payload for a page display event.

privacy.consent_dependency: analytics consent according to client privacy mode
privacy.notes: Use controlled page names and chapter taxonomy; do not include raw user identifiers or sensitive query parameters.

steps: Open the generic content page once.
expected_data_layer: Not applicable when the Piano SDK is implemented directly; if GTM is used as a bridge, verify the matching trigger context.
expected_network: Piano collection request contains event name page.display.
Properties page, page_chapter1, and page_chapter2 are populated.
qa.debugview_expectation: page.display appears once with the expected page taxonomy.

events.implementation_notes: Do not translate this event to GA4 page_view unless GA4 is also in scope as a separate platform mapping.

official_verification.scope_note: Official Piano event and property scope checked for page.display.

duplicate_risk.reason: Piano event is collected through the Piano SDK for this platform-specific fixture.
duplicate_risk.dedupe_rule: Keep Piano SDK calls separate from GA4 dataLayer events.

events.business_question: Which internal navigation clicks move users from the content page to deeper content?
events.trigger: User clicks a tracked internal navigation link.

platform_mappings.implementation_notes: Use a controlled click taxonomy and avoid raw link text when it changes frequently.

implementation_payloads.notes: Canonical Piano SDK payload for an internal navigation click.

privacy.consent_dependency: analytics consent according to client privacy mode
privacy.notes: Use controlled click names and chapters; do not send personal identifiers.

steps: Click a tracked related article or internal navigation link.
expected_data_layer: Not applicable when the Piano SDK is implemented directly; if GTM is used as a bridge, verify the matching trigger context.
expected_network: Piano collection request contains event name click.navigation.
Properties click, click_chapter1, and click_chapter2 are populated.
qa.debugview_expectation: click.navigation appears after the internal navigation click.

events.implementation_notes: Use click.action instead if the interaction performs an action without navigating.

official_verification.scope_note: Official Piano event and property scope checked for click.navigation.

duplicate_risk.reason: Piano event is collected through the Piano SDK for this platform-specific fixture.
duplicate_risk.dedupe_rule: Keep Piano SDK calls separate from GA4 dataLayer events.

parameters.reporting_purpose: Supports Piano page display reporting with a stable page name.

official_verification.scope_note: Official Piano property scope checked for page.

parameters.reporting_purpose: Segments Piano page and click reporting by top-level site section.
parameters.value_rules: Use controlled lowercase ASCII snake_case values.

official_verification.scope_note: Official Piano property scope checked for page_chapter1.

parameters.reporting_purpose: Segments Piano page and click reporting by second-level site section.
parameters.value_rules: Use controlled lowercase ASCII snake_case values.

official_verification.scope_note: Official Piano property scope checked for page_chapter2.

parameters.reporting_purpose: Provides the readable Piano click label for navigation analysis.

official_verification.scope_note: Official Piano property scope checked for click.

parameters.reporting_purpose: Segments Piano click reporting by top-level navigation area.
parameters.value_rules: Use controlled lowercase ASCII snake_case values.

official_verification.scope_note: Official Piano property scope checked for click_chapter1.

parameters.reporting_purpose: Segments Piano click reporting by destination or content family.
parameters.value_rules: Use controlled lowercase ASCII snake_case values.

official_verification.scope_note: Official Piano property scope checked for click_chapter2.

not_tracked.interaction: Raw article title as a high-cardinality navigation label
not_tracked.reason: A controlled click taxonomy is easier to maintain and safer for reporting.

assumptions: Piano Analytics JavaScript SDK is the implementation method.
No GA4 stream is in scope for this generic fixture.

documentation_sources_checked.name: Piano Analytics standard events
documentation_sources_checked.checked_for: page.display and click.navigation event names and properties

steps: Open the generic content page once.
expected_data_layer: Not applicable when the Piano SDK is implemented directly; if GTM is used as a bridge, verify the matching trigger context.
expected_network: Piano collection request contains event name page.display.
Properties page, page_chapter1, and page_chapter2 are populated.
qa_cases.debugview_expectation: page.display appears once with the expected page taxonomy.

steps: Click a tracked related article or internal navigation link.
expected_data_layer: Not applicable when the Piano SDK is implemented directly; if GTM is used as a bridge, verify the matching trigger context.
expected_network: Piano collection request contains event name click.navigation.
Properties click, click_chapter1, and click_chapter2 are populated.
qa_cases.debugview_expectation: click.navigation appears after the internal navigation click.
